results.answer:
Quick question first — to give you a useful answer:
1.
About what topic? *(finance / tech / sports / politics / culture / world)
2. From which region? *(US / India / UK / EU / global)
3. What time window? *(today / this week / this month)

Quick question first — to give you a useful answer:
1.
Budget range? *(under $500 / $500–1000 / $1000–2000 / $2000+)

Genre / style? *(drama / comedy / thriller / documentary / any)

results.prompt: I want to start an ecommerce business in India with a $5000 budget. What should I focus on first?
results.answer: Quick question first — to give you a useful answer:1. What type of product are you considering selling? (Physical goods / Digital products / Services)2. What is your primary sales channel? (Social Media / E-commerce Platform like Shopify / Local Marketplaces like Amazon India)3. What is your timeline for starting? (Immediately / Within1-3 months / Longer term)If you can provide more details, I can give you a more specific plan.
